atlas_release.title: Status, Time Filters, Downloads, and Static API

datasets.description: Site-level Nigerian oil and gas fields with status, fuel, operator, and ownership context.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGET mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Verified source points; field snapshot dates from August 2023.
datasets.label: Oil & Gas Fields

datasets.description: Gas transmission pipeline routes that include Nigeria.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GGIT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Public route geometry; cross-border projects may extend beyond Nigeria.
datasets.label: Gas Pipelines

datasets.description: Oil and NGL transmission pipeline routes that include Nigeria.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOIT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Public route geometry; storage terminals are not included.
datasets.label: Oil & NGL Pipelines

datasets.description: Nigerian LNG terminal train records with capacity and status context.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GGIT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Site points with train-level records; multiple records may share a facility.
datasets.label: LNG Terminals

datasets.description: Oil- and gas-fired generating units across Nigerian power stations.
datasets.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGPT mirror
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
datasets.quality_note: Unit-level records; counts are not unique power-station counts.
datasets.label: Gas & Oil Power Plants

datasets.description: Major Nigerian refinery sites with nameplate capacity and public status context.
datasets.quality_note: Major refineries only; some coordinates are approximate and modular refineries are incomplete.
datasets.label: Refineries

datasets.description: Protected and conserved areas including forest reserves, parks, and wetlands.
datasets.quality_note: Authoritative source geometry, simplified only for web display.
datasets.label: Protected Areas (WDPA)

datasets.description: Cross-category industrial demand centres covering cement, steel, fertiliser, and refining.
datasets.source: Atlas compilation reconciled against GEM and OpenStreetMap
datasets.license: Derived compilation; OSM-derived elements are ODbL
datasets.quality_note: Most sites were independently checked; eight locations remain less precisely verified.
datasets.label: Demand Centers

datasets.description: Motorway and trunk road segments used in the public web map.
datasets.quality_note: Web subset only; the processed CSV also includes primary and secondary roads.
datasets.label: Major Roads

datasets.quality_note: Geometry reflects OSM mapping, not confirmed operational service.
datasets.label: Railways

datasets.quality_note: Locations reflect OSM coverage and may include inactive stations.
datasets.label: Railway Stations

datasets.description: Mapped electricity transmission and minor-line segments.
datasets.quality_note: Useful for geometry screening; voltage attributes are incomplete.
datasets.label: Power Grid Lines

datasets.description: Mapped electricity substations represented as display points.
datasets.quality_note: Footprints are converted to centroids in the web bundle; electrical specifications are incomplete.
datasets.label: Substations

datasets.description: Nigerian seaports and offshore oil and gas terminals.
datasets.source: NGA World Port Index via HDX
datasets.quality_note: Locations are stable, but facility attributes come from a 2017 source file.
datasets.label: Ports & Terminals

datasets.description: Site-level off-grid and mini-grid inventory with technology, status, and reported capacity.
datasets.license: Public portal; explicit redistribution terms not stated
datasets.quality_note: All current records are exact-site geocoded; not a complete solar-home-system registry.
datasets.label: Off-grid & Mini-grids
